4036.issue: [S4036] Consider adding .vscode/settings.json file with JSON schema definitions for better development experience with Visual Studio Code.

5004.issue: [S5004] Plain setInterval() found in source files (example/conn.js). Please use this.setInterval() or adapter.setInterval() instead.

5005.issue: [S5005] Plain setTimeout() found in source files (example/conn.js, example/socket-client/Connection.js, ...). Please use this.setTimeout() or adapter.setTimeout() instead.

5042.issue: [W5042] Package "passport" is used in source file(s) (src/lib/socketWS.ts) but not found in dependencies of [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.ws/blob/master/package.json). Dependency might be missing.

5050.issue: [E5050] process.exit() used in  (src/main.ts). This is incompatible with compact mode as it terminates the entire host process. Remove process.exit() or set common.compact to false at [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.ws/blob/master/io-package.json).

5051.issue: [S5051] Custom sleep/wait function(s) found in source files (example/socket-client/tools.d.ts, example/socket-client/tools.js). Consider using the built-in "this.delay()" method provided by the ioBroker adapter base class instead.

5612.issue: [W5612] "admin/jsonConfig.json/items/mainTab/items/ttl" attribute "label" uses key "Login timeout" which is not found in the English translation file at "admin/i18n/en".

8917.issue: [W8917] At least major versions of @types/node should not be updated by dependabot. Please add ignore block at dependabot.yml.

0036.issue: [E0036] @alcalzone/release-script 5.2.0 specified. 5.2.1 is required as minimum,  5.2.1 (or newer) is current. Please update devDependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.ws/blob/master/package.json)

0085.issue: [S0085] No devDependency "@tsconfig/nodeXX" found. Consider adding one for proper type checking (see ioBroker.examples for examples).

0088.issue: [S0088] "/tsconfig.json" should contain an extends clause like "extends": "@tsconfig/node20/tsconfig.json" (see ioBroker.examples).

0028.issue: [W0028] Minimum node.js version 22 recommended. The current engines.node clause ">=20" allows Node.js 20.0.0 as minimum. Please update it to require at least ">=22" at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.ws/blob/master/package.json).

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.9.1" at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.ws/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 20. Downgrade to node.js 20.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
